optionA.text: Setae present from the first segment

optionB.text: Setae present from the second segment

optionA.text: Modified setae either pseudocomposite or curved with a subterminal arista on concave side of the shaft
Modified setae not greatly different from the capillary setae, but somewhat thicker and more abruptly tapering and with a long arista

optionB.text: Modified setae distally strongly curved, or bifid, either with numbers of long aristae or bearded

optionA.text: Nuchal organ on posterior part of prostomium, prostomium with several transverse bands of cilia

optionB.text: Nuchal organ on the reduced peristomium; with a single preoral ciliary band or prostomial ciliary bands absent

optionA.text: Three prebranchial setigers; terminal prostomial sense organs absent

optionB.text: More than three prebranchial setigers; terminal prostomial sense organs present
